summary: MiraOSPage with Header Shell Navigation tested and fixed. All 7 tabs (Mojo, Today, Picks, Services, Insights, Learn, Concierge) render correctly and tab switching works. Fixed 2 bugs: duplicate route and proactiveAlerts TypeError.

mojo_tab.shows: Pet profile, Soul Score, Soul Questions button, Health Vault button

bugs_fixed.issue: Duplicate route for /mira-os pointing to MiraDemoPage
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed duplicate route, kept MiraOSPage route at line 310

bugs_fixed.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length') in WelcomeHero
bugs_fixed.cause: proactiveAlerts state initialized without celebrations/healthReminders arrays
bugs_fixed.fix: Added celebrations: [] and healthReminders: [] to proactiveAlerts state initialization

context_for_next_testing_agent: MiraOSPage with Header Shell Navigation is working. 7 tabs: Mojo (pet profile), Today (alerts), Picks (recommendations), Services (chat - default), Insights (patterns), Learn (knowledge), Concierge (human help). Route: /mira-os. Test-ids: mira-os-page, mira-header-tabs, header-tab-{tabname}, mojo-soul-btn, concierge-connect-btn
